languages.text: "Достойный ответ. Воистину, каковы бы ни были распри между нами, мы не должны проявлять слабости перед истинным врагом. Долг перед Человечеством — и династией — превыше всего".
"A worthy answer. Truly, whatever differences may stand between us, we must not show weakness before the true enemy. Duty to Humanity and to the dynasty outweighs all else."
languages.original_text: "Достойный ответ. Воистину, каковы бы ни были распри между нами, мы не должны проявлять слабости перед истинным врагом. Долг перед Человечеством — и династией — превыше всего".

traits.locale_text: "A worthy answer. Truly, whatever strife may exist between us, we must not show weakness before the true enemy. Duty to Humanity and to the dynasty outweighs all else."
"A worthy answer. Truly, whatever strife may exist between us, we must not show weakness before the true enemy. Duty to Humanity and to the dynasty outweighs all else."
"A worthy answer. Truly, whatever differences may stand between us, we must not show weakness before the true enemy. Duty to Humanity and to the dynasty outweighs all else."
"A worthy answer. Truly, whatever differences may stand between us, we must not show weakness before the true enemy. Duty to Humanity and to the dynasty outweighs all else."
"A worthy answer. Truly, whatever differences may stand between us, we must not show weakness before the true enemy. Duty to Humanity and to the dynasty outweighs all else."

languages.text: “有模有样的回答。的确，不管你我之间有何分歧，都不能在真正的敌人面前露怯。对人类和王朝的责任重于一切。”
languages.original_text: "A worthy answer. Truly, whatever differences may stand between us, we must not show weakness before the true enemy. Duty to Humanity and to the dynasty outweighs all else."

traits.locale_text: “有模有样的回答。的确，不管你我之间有何分歧，都不能在真正的敌人面前露怯。对人类和王朝的责任重于一切。”

languages.text: «Es una respuesta digna. Efectivamente, sean cuales sean nuestras diferencias, no podemos mostrar debilidad ante el verdadero enemigo. El deber hacia la Humanidad y la dinastía se anteponen a todo».
languages.original_text: "A worthy answer. Truly, whatever differences may stand between us, we must not show weakness before the true enemy. Duty to Humanity and to the dynasty outweighs all else."

traits.locale_text: «Es una respuesta digna. Efectivamente, sean cuales sean nuestras diferencias, no podemos mostrar debilidad ante el verdadero enemigo. El deber hacia la Humanidad y la dinastía se anteponen a todo».

languages.text: « Une réponse honorable. En dépit de nos différences, nous ne devons en aucun cas montrer la moindre faiblesse face au véritable ennemi. Notre devoir envers l'humanité et la dynastie passe avant tout. »
languages.original_text: "A worthy answer. Truly, whatever differences may stand between us, we must not show weakness before the true enemy. Duty to Humanity and to the dynasty outweighs all else."

traits.locale_text: « Une réponse honorable. En dépit de nos différences, nous ne devons en aucun cas montrer la moindre faiblesse face au véritable ennemi. Notre devoir envers l'humanité et la dynastie passe avant tout. »

languages.text: "Uygun bir cevap. Gerçekten de aramızdaki farklılıklar ne olursa olsun, gerçek düşman karşısında zayıflık göstermemeliyiz. İnsanlığa ve hanedanlığa olan vazife, her şeyden üstündür."
languages.original_text: "A worthy answer. Truly, whatever differences may stand between us, we must not show weakness before the true enemy. Duty to Humanity and to the dynasty outweighs all else."

traits.locale_text: "Uygun bir cevap. Gerçekten de aramızdaki farklılıklar ne olursa olsun, gerçek düşman karşısında zayıflık göstermemeliyiz. İnsanlığa ve hanedanlığa olan vazife, her şeyden üstündür."

languages.text: "Eine würdige Antwort. Es stimmt, egal, welche Differenzen zwischen uns stehen, dürfen wir im Angesicht des wahren Feindes keine Schwäche zeigen. Die Pflicht gegenüber der Menschheit und der Dynastie steht über allem."
languages.original_text: "A worthy answer. Truly, whatever differences may stand between us, we must not show weakness before the true enemy. Duty to Humanity and to the dynasty outweighs all else."

traits.locale_text: "Eine würdige Antwort. Es stimmt, egal, welche Differenzen zwischen uns stehen, dürfen wir im Angesicht des wahren Feindes keine Schwäche zeigen. Die Pflicht gegenüber der Menschheit und der Dynastie steht über allem."

languages.text: 「立派な答えだ。確かに、我々には違いがあるかもしれないが、真の敵の前に弱さを見せはならない。人類と王朝への義務は、すべてを上回る。」
languages.original_text: "A worthy answer. Truly, whatever differences may stand between us, we must not show weakness before the true enemy. Duty to Humanity and to the dynasty outweighs all else."

traits.locale_text: 「立派な答えだ。確かに、我々には違いがあるかもしれないが、真の敵の前に弱さを見せはならない。人類と王朝への義務は、すべてを上回る。」
